name: Geronimo Professional Svc LLC
recent_news: No public news, web presence, NYC OPT vendor listing, or FMCSA carrier record was located under this exact name in Staten Island. Unable to confirm it is an active school-bus operator vs. a small services LLC with the 'school' SIC tagged in data sources.
fit_notes: Too little public information to evaluate. Listed as 27 employees / ~$1.1M revenue / 'school' tag in source data, but no confirmation it is an actual school-bus contractor; could be a small van/professional services LLC. Needs direct outreach/secondary database (NYS DOS, NYC OPT vendor list) before further evaluation.

name: D & J School Bus Co
districts_or_customers: likely Sayre Area SD and/or Athens Area SD (Bradford County, PA)
recent_news: Active interstate carrier with USDOT 2111268 registered since 2011; FMCSA snapshot lists 17 power units / 18 drivers under owner Jeffrey L. Agnew. No M&A or ownership-change news found.
fit_notes: Small family-run school-bus contractor in the Sayre/Athens area on the PA-NY border, ~17 buses, owner-operator (Jeffrey Agnew). Right size and profile for a Summit tuck-in in northern PA / Southern Tier NY; succession status unknown but worth a direct call given single-owner structure.

name: Meryc Bus Co
districts_or_customers: likely Yonkers Public Schools or Westchester-area private/SPED routes
recent_news: No M&A, ownership, or news coverage found. Confirmed to exist at 20 Torre Pl, Yonkers, NY 10703 via Yelp business listing; no website, no FMCSA snapshot surfaced, no parent-company affiliation found.
fit_notes: Very small Yonkers-area bus operator (~21 employees, ~$1.1M est. revenue). Likely independent given lack of any parent affiliation in public records, but limited footprint and unknown ownership/succession means low priority pending direct contact. Westchester County is core Summit/Beacon competition geography.

name: School Bus Drivers Inc
recent_news: NLRB Case 06-RC-288857 (2022) names Smith Bus Company and School Bus Drivers, Inc. as joint employers for drivers/aides at the Kiski garage, confirming SBD is the labor/driver-leasing arm of the Smith Bus family-owned operation founded by Miles & Esther Smith in 1965 and now led by Randall L. Smith (PSBA board since 1993, won PSBA 'The Bus Stops Here' award).
fit_notes: NOT a standalone target. 'School Bus Drivers Inc' is the joint-employer driver-staffing entity for Smith Bus Company, a 60-year family-owned western PA operator serving 7 districts across 6 garages (Blairsville/Elderton/Kiski/Marion Center/Millwood/Saltsburg). Smith Bus itself is the real prospect: legitimate Summit tuck-in candidate given second-generation ownership (Randy Smith), long PSBA tenure, multi-district contract book, and likely succession horizon. Approach as Smith Bus Co., not as SBD.

name: K & K Bus Ny INC
recent_news: No website, NYC OPT vendor list match, FMCSA carrier snapshot, or news coverage was located under this name at 19 Pike St, NY 10002 (Lower East Side / Chinatown). 19 Pike St is also a long-distance Chinatown bus stop address, raising the possibility this entity is mis-categorized and is actually an intercity Chinatown bus operator rather than a yellow school bus contractor.
fit_notes: High risk of being a Chinatown-style intercity/charter bus operator rather than a NYC school-bus contractor (19 Pike St is a known Chinatown bus stop location). No NYC OPT vendor confirmation found. Deprioritize until the underlying business is confirmed to actually run yellow school bus / SPED service for NYC DOE.
